message:
Create ADOPTERS.MD to list KubeStellar adopters

Added a list of organizations that have adopted KubeStellar Console.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Adopters
+
+Listed below are organizations that have adopted KubeStellar Console in one way or another. We are delighted to welcome them to the KubeStellar community. If you are using KubeStellar Console in your organization, or benefitting from the KubeStellar Marketplace, Installer Missions, or Solution Missions, we would love to add you to the list below. You can open a pull request against this file directly.
+
+
+| Organization  | Description | Maturity Level | Further Information |
+| ------------- | ------------- | --- | --- |
